purpose: Decide when a source-derived concrete artifact name should stay active, become compatibility-only, or become an archived reference.

artifact_classes.meaning: Semantic role survives in a current active contract, but the old filename itself is not required.
Old artifact identity is preserved only because a real downstream consumer still needs it.
Historical artifact name is preserved as rationale or traceability, not as a default current contract.

default_rules: Prefer active semantic successors over reviving historical filenames as active contracts.
Use compatibility_artifact only when a real consumer requires the old identity.
Otherwise keep the historical filename as archived_reference.
